subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for your message — we'd be happy to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

Please find below some proposed meeting slots:
- Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
- Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

All times are UTC. Let us know which slot works best for you and we'll send a calendar invite.
Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm unable to share internal contact information. For general inquiries and introductions, please visit our public website at https://www.company.com, where you can find the appropriate channels to reach our senior team members.

Thanks and we look forward to connecting!

Best regards
